heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 284b Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary, but not in excess of $5,473,000, to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1972— increased maximum sums authorized to be appropriated from not in excess of $600,000 to not in excess of $5,473,000.Pub. L. 92–272
amendments: Amendments1972— increased maximum sums authorized to be appropriated from not in excess of $600,000 to not in excess of $5,473,000.Pub. L. 92–272
